---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest something new that would make SellerMate more useful
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: feature-request, beta-feedback
assignees: ''
---

## What problem does this solve?

Describe the problem you face as a seller (or buyer) that this feature would fix.

e.g. "When I have 200 products it's hard to find slow-moving stock without scrolling through everything."

## Describe the feature you'd like

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Who benefits?

- [ ] Seller (dashboard user)
- [ ] Buyer (store / marketplace visitor)
- [ ] Both

## Where should this appear?

Which page or section of the app is most relevant?

e.g. `/inventory`, the order detail page, the checkout form

## Alternatives you've considered

Any workarounds you currently use, or other tools that do this well.

## Priority (your opinion)

- [ ] High — I can't run my business well without this
- [ ] Medium — would save me real time every week
- [ ] Low — nice to have eventually

## Additional context

Any mockups, screenshots from other apps, or extra detail.
